source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Fourteen white cubes are put together to form the figure on the right. The complete surface of the figure, including the bottom, is painted red. The figure is then separated into individual cubes. How many of the individual cubes have exactly four red faces?

<image1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to 'the figure on the right'
the cube arrangement is not fully specified in text and depends on the pictured 3D structure
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows 1 available image and registry_passed=true
multi_step: the task requires interpreting a 3D assembly of 14 cubes from the image
the question then asks about painted surface exposure after painting and separating the cubes
solving requires combining spatial identification of cube positions with counting cubes that have exactly four painted faces
verifiability: the target property is clearly defined: individual cubes with exactly four red faces
the result can be checked against the depicted figure, though verification still depends on correct image interpretation

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、图像和数值答案均存在，且 registry_passed=true
图像依赖虽高，但所需示意图文件可用，不构成核心语义缺失
综合信号较强：image_dependency、multi_step、verifiability 得分均较高
风险主要是题目依赖图像理解，而不是资产缺失，因此应进入候选池而非降级或拒绝
